narrative: 320-acre conventional + organic transition operation. Pesticide REI violation — 12 workers re-entered field 8 hours after chlorpyrifos application (24-hour REI required). Pesticide PHI violation — strawberry harvest 2026-04-22 occurred 2 days after captan application (5-day PHI). MRL exceedance — composite sample from packing house showed 0.18 ppm thiabendazole on stone fruit (MRL 0.10 ppm). Organic split-op unsegregated — conventional + organic operations using shared harvest bins; no documented sanitation between. Water quality E. coli exceedance — surface-water source for overhead irrigation showed geometric mean 184 CFU/100 mL and STV 612 — both above 21 CFR 112.44 thresholds. Child labor indicator — three workers age 14-15 observed operating motorized harvest platforms (hazardous task per ILO 182). Worker H+S — heat-illness plan not documented; no shaded rest area within 200ft of work zones. Recall plan untested for 26 months. NOP organic certification at risk — last inspection found unsegregated commingling.
